creator: erwin.vandevelde@gmail.com
text:
When installing the latest version from the ports, the compilation goes fine but installation returns:

===>  Installing for dnsmasq-2.32
** Missing /usr/ports/dns/dnsmasq/files/dnsmasq.sh.in for dnsmasq-2.32.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/dns/dnsmasq.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/dns/dnsmasq.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portinstall10480.13 env PORT_UPGRADE=yes make PORT_UPGRADE=yes DEPENDS_TARGET=package reinstall

How-To-Repeat: portinstall dnsmasq
